productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Maroon Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone oxfords. Give your formal wear a twist of fashion with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of its cushioned footbed all day.UpperLeather upper with a suede inner lining for absolute style, flexibility, durability and all-day comfortLong tongue with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free all-day comfortshort lace-up system for a snug, customised FitWraparound leather overlay at the lower backfoot for durability and to offer better support to the heelMidsolePadded synthetic leather footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with block lugs that have horizontal and vertical grooves for absolute grip on smooth surfacesOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for enhanced durability and better backfoot protectionshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
